ogTitle: Scotchy Pocket vs Scrub Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Scotchy Pocket and Scrub Creek.
heading: Scotchy Pocket vs Scrub Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Scotchy Pocket, Queensland and Scrub Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Scotchy Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Scrub Creek (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Scotchy Pocket or Scrub Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Scotchy Pocket has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Scrub Creek scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Scotchy Pocket scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Scrub Creek scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Scotchy Pocket or Scrub Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Scotchy Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
